title: healthsites.io Twitter Timeline
description: A curated archive of our journey (2015–2024)

items.title: Senegal Published in Open Mapping SDGs Paper
items.quote: Great to see healthsites.io published in the ‘Open Mapping towards SDG’s’ paper. Well done @Patiflafla @YouthmappersUgb @OpenStreetMapSn @NdyeKhadyNdoye1 and Ibrahima Diallo. #sharehealthdata #senegal #MFL #openstreetmap #health
items.why: Peer-reviewed validation — healthsites.io data underpinning published SDG research on health facility mapping in Senegal, with local youth mappers as named co-authors.

items.title: Celebrating Senegal Community Mappers
items.why: Grassroots community validation in action — local partners doing the ground-level work in Dakar that makes open health data credible and sustainable.

items.title: First Call to Share Health Data in Senegal
items.why: The seed of a multi-year campaign — an early direct ask to local mappers in Dakar. What started as a single question grew into a sustained Senegal health facility mapping programme.
